description: You are a Clinical Operations Manager at a regional non-profit blood bank. Transform the provided building shell into a fully laid-out blood donation center. The layout must include at least two private Screening Rooms, a Staff Processing/Storage Room, an open Donation Floor, a Reception area, and a Recovery Canteen. Construct partition walls and install at least 3 interior doors to enclose the private spaces. Name at least 5 zones within the floor plan. Furnish the clinic with at least 6 donor seating units (armchairs, loungers, or beds) on the Donation Floor; at least 3 desks/counters and 12 standard chairs across the Reception and Screening areas; at least 2 tables, 2 appliances, and 2 sinks across the Canteen and Staff Processing areas; and at least 2 storage units for medical supplies. Annotate the plan with at least 2 dimension lines for ADA compliance. Save the final layout to /home/ga/Documents/blood_center_layout.sh3d.
